captured_from: live application (real pipeline + FastAPI + Vite dev server)

screenshots.caption: Command Center — enterprise quality score, issue counts by severity, and the highest-exposure defects, all read from the live API.
screenshots.alt: BOM Guardian Command Center dashboard showing the enterprise quality score, issue counts by severity, and a ranked list of highest-impact data-quality issues.

screenshots.caption: Data Quality Explorer — filterable, paginated issues from the 49-rule engine with severity, domain, and status.
screenshots.alt: Data Quality Explorer table listing detected data-quality issues with rule id, severity, domain, entity, and status columns.

screenshots.caption: Remediation Workbench — issue evidence, a governed AI proposal (schema-validated, grounded, human-review-required), and the steward decision panel showing the authenticated actor.
screenshots.alt: Remediation Workbench showing issue summary, evidence rows, an AI remediation proposal with confidence and explanation, and an approve or reject decision panel.

screenshots.caption: Part 360 — searchable part master with the golden record, per-field lineage (source, reason, confidence) and blast-radius impact.
screenshots.alt: Part 360 page listing parts with a selected part's golden record, field-level lineage, and impact metrics.

screenshots.caption: BOM Graph Explorer — multi-level bill-of-materials traversal with cycle, orphan, and reverse-dependency analysis.
screenshots.alt: BOM Graph Explorer showing an interactive node-and-edge graph of a multi-level bill of materials for the selected part.

screenshots.caption: Scenario Simulator — counterfactual merge/correction/replacement with before-and-after diffs and newly introduced conflicts. Simulations are persisted separately and never mutate baseline data.
screenshots.alt: Scenario Simulator showing a simulated part merge with before and after comparison and any newly introduced conflicts.

screenshots.caption: AI Governance — every AI call audited: provider, model, prompt version, latency, validation result, abstention, and confidence.
screenshots.alt: AI Governance dashboard listing audited AI calls with provider, model, latency, validation outcome, and confidence.

screenshots.caption: Data Steward Copilot — read-only, allowlisted retrieval with cited evidence; refuses mutations and answers 'insufficient evidence' rather than guessing.
screenshots.alt: Data Steward Copilot chat panel showing a question about critical issues and a cited, evidence-backed answer.
